elements.name: Validate Stock Availability Check for "508201" for Organization "1BL"

steps.name: User login into VBCS Order Capture
User should see Order Capture dashboard
Select customer as "SMITH AND BYFORD LTD"
get the stock of the "508201" added to the basket
user invokes Stock Availability Check API for the "508201" and "1BL"
stock number in response should match the data in UI
user invokes Quick Availability Check API for the "508201" and "1BL"
extract the ExpectedShipDateTime from the response

name: Create Account Order in Order Capture UI
